briefs.title: ICBC Rate Review Deadline Extended to 2027, December 2025 Filing Exempted
briefs.summary: BC has updated the rules governing how ICBC (the province's public auto insurer) sets its rates. The current policy review period has been extended by one year to March 31, 2027, and ICBC has been exempted from having to file for a general rate change order (a formal request to adjust what drivers pay for insurance) by December 15, 2025.

key_dates.label: ICBC general rate change filing exemption deadline — BC regulation
